---
name: Question
about: For questions about how something works or requests for clarification/help.
title: "[QUESTION]"
labels: question, support
assignees: ''

---

### Question

Ask your question clearly and concisely.

- What are you trying to do?
- What part is unclear or confusing?
- What have you tried already?

### Context / Example

(Optional) Include code snippets, screenshots, error messages, or anything that helps clarify your question.
